He discourages other marketers of seminars to restaurant owners because they aren't willing to go spend $75,000 to get a celebrity and they start to look at this campaign that oh my god they got elephants they got George Foreman they got acrobats they got this they got that well I can never run up against that so I won't play the game at all now it's going to be very hard to see that benefit because you don't see what didn't happen to you it's like how do you brag about stopping a terrorist if you can't tell what you did but somewhere there's somebody who might have attempted to come into the marketplace who you now would have had to spend money to deal with and now you don't have to because George brought you some insulation if you wanted to use them that way which Rory hasn't how else does George help you with the media and the industry certainly it's worth news releases that George Foreman the George Foreman grill guy is speaking at this event will trade journals write about that sure they will right should you invite the three trade journal editors to a special reception with George at your meeting there by bus so there's a lot of ways that you can recover that 75,000 bucks and bootcamping a box sales etc etc etc so usually this is money well spent and it usually doesn't in our kinds of businesses it doesn't take much to see direct recovery and then there's a lot of other indirect benefits and again just think about reputation right and what people say about us and what they tell other people about us and stories they're telling well if everybody in the restaurant industry is saying Rory's a guy who hangs out with George Foreman and hangs out with this celebrity hangs out with that celebrity that's a better thing being said about him than if we and that has enormous value so usage controls money the biggest thing to leave out is broadcast so if you're not using them for TV and you're not using them for radio it makes it a lot easier to get a deal they have a lot less anxiety about it and so forth the other quick things to understand is that most of them don't get what we do so it takes some patience and some you know like Rory used Mike Ditka last year and Ditka goes and does a lot of speaking but that's like it I mean somebody sends him there he gets there he speaks he leaves you know so like they had him scheduled for a tele-seminar and thank God Ditka's assistant calls like two days before the tele-seminar and says who's picking him up at the airport and what time is he supposed to be in Vancouver for this seminar you guys got him booked for now he's done a tele-seminar well nobody knew what a tele-seminar was right so he's got his bags packed and he's ready to head to O'Hare you know to get on airplane to go somewhere to do this damn seminar that he don't remember having agreed to do so they don't know you know they don't get what we do the other thing about celebrities to always think about is how you can buy a big one for the price of a small one so a lot of us have had the opportunity to do that in the past few years because of Trump and the apprentice so we had Bill Ransack at a super conference lot less expensive to get Bill Ransack than it is to get Donald Trump we had Christie Frank do some things lot less expensive to get Christie than Donald Trump but they're like linked at the hip so really we're buying Trump at a discount is what what we're doing okay
